questions.question: In the end-to-end business process model, which specific workflow is responsible for 'demand planning & inventory'?
questions.explanation: Forecast to Fulfill covers the lifecycle of demand planning and inventory management.

questions.question: How does the presentation define the 'Bridge' in the context of the mindset shift?
options: Focusing on ES6+ and syntax performance
Using technical knowledge to build and use enterprise-grade solutions
Managing the relationship between the Big Four firms
Automating payroll and invoicing via shared databases
questions.explanation: The Bridge represents the synthesis of technical expertise with enterprise-level solution building.

questions.question: Which of the following is identified as the world's largest professional services firm by revenue?
questions.explanation: Deloitte is cited as the largest of the 'Big Four' globally by revenue.

questions.question: When transitioning to a Consultant role, where should the primary focus shift to, according to the 'External View'?
options: Business Processes, ROI, and client pain points
questions.explanation: The Consultant (External View) prioritizes business processes, return on investment (ROI), and client needs.

questions.question: What role does a 'shared database' play in an ERP system as described in the content?
options: It isolates departments to prevent data leaks
It ensures every department works from the same data without duplicates
It acts as a next-gen cloud-first platform for S/4HANA
It manages the procurement-to-pay lifecycle manual logic
questions.explanation: A shared database is central to an ERP, ensuring data consistency across all departments.

questions.question: In the SAP End-to-End business process framework, 'Recruit to Retire' specifically manages which lifecycle?
questions.explanation: Recruit to Retire is the designated workflow for the human resources lifecycle.

questions.question: What percentage of world transaction revenue is stated to touch an SAP system?
questions.explanation: The presentation highlights that 77% of the world's transaction revenue runs through SAP.

questions.question: KPMG is noted for having a particularly strong presence in which sector?
questions.explanation: KPMG is recognized for its strong advisory and audit services in the financial services sectors.

questions.question: According to the transformation findings, a system is described as only being as good as:
options: The number of free vouchers provided
questions.explanation: The lesson learned was that the technical system is dependent on the quality of the underlying business logic.

questions.question: Which term is used to describe SAP S/4HANA in the transformation process?
questions.explanation: S/4HANA is the next-generation platform replacing legacy ERP systems globally.
